name: Pointdexter
short_description: Tiles will copy your moves. Use pencils to draw bridges and get to the next page!
detailed_description:
Pointdexter is a 2D puzzle platformer where tiles can be drawn, and will move in the same direction as you do. Use pencils, erasers, and even other doodles to solve every puzzle!

The Artist hasn’t been able to draw due to artist’s block. Well? Go find this block and blow it to pieces. Play as Pointdexter, a doodle in The Artist’s sketchbook, and draw tiles with your trusty pencils to reach new pages and put an end to the artist’s block.
about_the_game:

The Artist hasn’t been able to draw due to artist’s block. Well? Go find this block and blow it to pieces. Play as Pointdexter, a doodle in The Artist’s sketchbook, and draw tiles with your trusty pencils to reach new pages and put an end to the artist’s block.
